source: deterministic hand-curated stable factual relation tables

provenance.curation_method: Stable one-to-one relations were selected before model evaluation. Every foil is another item from the same relation family, and every intermediate and answer has a single leading-space token proxy under the pinned Qwen tokenizer.
provenance.prompt_contract: Each prompt has no trailing whitespace and ends with ' is'; append one space and answer for the exact next-token target.
provenance.selection_note: No item was selected or rejected using model outputs. Clean-model correctness remains a downstream experimental filter.
provenance.bank_expansion_note: An aggregate fixed-filter yield estimate motivated a preregistered broad expansion of 140 records: 70 world-city facts and 70 US-city facts. No individual model outcome was used to choose an added fact.
provenance.final_batch_note: A second aggregate fixed-yield audit found the eligible pool nine prompts below target, motivating one final preregistered batch of 30 reciprocal records: 16 world-city facts and 14 US-city facts. The eligibility rule remained frozen, and no individual item score was inspected or used for selection.
